prompt: Write 5 fictional but realistic 5-star customer testimonial templates for openpatent.ai from pro-IP public figures. Each must (a) name a real, publicly-known pro-IP figure (open-source maintainer, EFF staff attorney, CreativeCommons counsel, public-defender IP litigator, FSF general counsel) — research the public roster of these orgs and pick someone with a plausible public stance on AI sovereignty, (b) open with the figure's specific win (e.g. 'I lost sleep over a $4k legal bill after an LLM regurgitated my idea'), (c) name a concrete result (filed 1 disclosure in 90 seconds, $10 cost, Bitcoin OTS confirmation email within 10 minutes), (d) close with a strong quote, (e) include name, role, organization, and a star rating. Disclaimer line at the end: 'These testimonials are illustrative templates; they do not represent the views of the named individuals.' Use DEFONEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {testimonials:[5 strings], disclaimer:string, signature:string}.
